ROI Calculator

Avatour pays quickly for itself.
Everything else is a bonus.

Enter your numbers below to see hard-dollar savings across all three Avatour pillars — live meetings, async collaboration, and AI-powered inspection reports.

Pillar 2 — Recorded Collaboration (Sync & Async)

Select all that apply. Your selection shapes the soft benefit analysis on Slide 3.
Pillar 1 — Live 360° Meetings
Replaces in-person site visits
Travel cost, productive time recovered, and CO₂ avoided. Calculation matches the Avatour ROI model.
Travel Mix & Distance
Mode % of Trips Avg Distance (km) Avg Overnights
🚗 Car
🚂 Train
✈️ Continental
🌍 Intercontinental
% total: 100% ✓ All trips accounted for
Pillar 2 — Recorded Collaboration (Sync & Async)
Reviews of recorded 360° assets
Every time your team reviews a recorded 360° asset together — whether in a live workspace meeting or solo async — it can replace what would otherwise have been an onsite visit. The calculator uses the same travel cost model as Pillar 1 (distances, per-diem, hourly rate, travel mix) to value each replaced visit, then applies your conversion factor to reflect how often that's actually the case.
Sync workspace meetings + solo async reviews combined
What fraction of these collaboration events genuinely replaces a trip that would otherwise have happened? 10% is a conservative starting point — raise it if your team regularly uses recorded meetings instead of travelling to site.
Pillar 3 — AI Inspection Report Generation
New capability
Avatour AI auto-generates structured inspection reports with findings linked directly to 360° video timestamps — eliminating hours of post-meeting report writing.
AI handles transcription, template fill & evidence linking
Avatour Subscription Cost
Used to calculate net ROI and payback period.
Enter your actual annual subscription cost to calculate net ROI and payback period.

What Comes For Free On Top
Strategic & qualitative benefits beyond the financial ROI calculated above. Highlighted cards are particularly relevant to your selected use cases.
What comes for free on top

The benefits you can't put a price on
— but your business will feel.

Your ROI calculation above captures the hard savings. These additional benefits come included — no extra line on the invoice.

Better Decision Quality
More experts join simultaneously — on-site specialists, remote managers, external consultants — increasing quality of findings and reducing costly rework cycles.
High Impact
Faster Corrective Action
Issues identified during an Avatour meeting are linked directly to 360° video evidence, allowing teams to act immediately rather than waiting for a follow-up visit.
High Impact
Increased Site Safety
Hazardous environments — factory floors, construction sites, remote facilities — can be inspected remotely, reducing physical exposure to risk.
Very High Impact
Improved Work-Life Balance
Fewer long-haul trips means less fatigue and burnout — especially for senior managers and quality engineers who travel most frequently.
High Impact
Less Site Disruption
A 360° meeting is far less disruptive than a physical delegation visit — reducing preparation effort and downtime for host teams.
Medium Impact
Permanent Visual Record
Every meeting creates a dated, searchable 360° video archive — invaluable for audits, training, project handovers, and compliance documentation.
Very High Impact
